hero.label: Physiotherapist — Rhode-Saint-Genèse
hero.tagline: The art of precision, the expertise of care.
experience.title: The BELTRA Experience
experience.subtitle: The technical mastery of your body
experience.intro: Born from excellence training at the Swiss border, the BELTRA method reinvents physiotherapy as one reinvents haute horlogerie: with precision, depth and an absolute demand for results.
experience.blocks.0.title: A high-precision diagnosis
experience.blocks.0.text: Like an engineer inspecting every component before intervening, we identify your real limitations — physical, neurological and emotional — before any treatment.
experience.blocks.1.title: Advanced protocols
experience.blocks.1.text: Deep tissue, IASTM, vacuum therapy, targeted joint mobilisations. Precision tools in service of complete and lasting recovery.
experience.blocks.2.title: The Performance vision
experience.blocks.2.text: The goal is not simply to eliminate pain. It is to optimise your physical capital so your body functions at its full potential — durably.
about.title: Who am I?
about.lead: I designed Zowe with a clear vision: to transform the physiotherapy session into a high-precision experience.
about.paragraph1: My approach doesn't stop at the disappearance of pain — it aims for the lasting optimisation of your physical capital.
about.paragraph2: To reach this level of excellence, I specifically trained in the BELTRA method. This expertise allows me to integrate advanced care protocols into my practice, focused on technical control and deep re-harmonisation of the body.
about.paragraph3: Every patient is unique, and I put my expertise and this specialisation at the service of a bespoke care journey, where scientific rigour meets the comfort of exclusive treatment.
services.title: Protocols & Investments
services.intro: Three levels of intervention, one goal: the excellence of your physical capital.
services.tiers.0.name: The Precision Audit
services.tiers.0.description: A complete and rigorous diagnosis of your physical capital. We identify together your real limitations, your tension zones and the deep origins of your pain.
services.tiers.0.ideal: First consultation or assessment before any BELTRA protocol.
services.tiers.1.name: The Harmonie Protocol
services.tiers.1.description: A targeted intervention, personalised according to your specific needs. Upper or lower body, according to your situation and current goals.
services.tiers.1.ideal: Regular follow-up, sports recovery, localised pain.
services.tiers.2.name: The Signature Experience
services.tiers.2.description: The BELTRA experience in its entirety. A global treatment of the body, nervous system and emotions. The complete reset your body is longing for.
services.tiers.2.ideal: Chronic conditions, intensive recovery, complete optimisation of physical capital.
faq.items.0.question: Is BELTRA care reimbursed by my health insurance?
faq.items.0.answer: As a non-contracted physiotherapist, BELTRA treatments are not reimbursed under INAMI rates. However, many health insurers offer partial reimbursements through supplementary insurance. Check directly with your insurance provider.
faq.items.1.question: Why did you choose non-contracted status?
faq.items.1.answer: Non-contracted status allows me to offer sessions without imposed time constraints, with advanced protocols that require a duration and quality of intervention incompatible with contracted rates. It is a deliberate choice in favour of excellence in care.
faq.items.2.question: How does the BELTRA Experience differ from a standard session?
faq.items.2.answer: A standard session generally treats the symptom. The BELTRA Experience treats the cause. We integrate postural assessment, tension chains, the nervous system and emotional dimensions of the body — elements rarely addressed in traditional physiotherapy.
faq.items.3.question: Who are BELTRA protocols designed for?
faq.items.3.answer: For anyone seeking a premium approach to their physical health: an athlete in recovery, a patient with years of chronic pain, or simply looking for a complete reset — BELTRA protocols adapt to your profile.
faq.items.4.question: How many sessions are needed?
faq.items.4.answer: The Precision Audit is the recommended starting point. Together we establish a bespoke protocol. For chronic pain, 3 to 5 sessions generally lead to significant and lasting improvement.
faq.items.5.question: How should I prepare for a session?
faq.items.5.answer: Come comfortably dressed, ideally in underwear or light sportswear. Avoid a heavy meal in the hour before the session. Above all, come with your questions — listening is an integral part of the protocol.
faq.items.6.question: Can I give a session as a gift?
faq.items.6.answer: Absolutely. A BELTRA session is a rare and memorable gift. Contact me directly via the form or by phone for gift card details.
contact.intro: A few details are enough to begin the journey. I will confirm your appointment as soon as possible.
form.newsletter: I agree to receive tips and news from Zoé by email.
form.note: Zoé will get back to you today to arrange a time that suits you.
